title: Innodata Inc (INOD) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Promising 2026 Outlook
text: Innodata demonstrated robust performance in Q4 2025, with quarterly revenue reaching $72.4 million, representing 22% year-over-year growth. For the full year, the company achieved $251.7 million in revenue, marking a substantial 48% annual increase. The adjusted gross margin for Q4 reached 42%, surpassing the company's 40% target. Adjusted EBITDA totaled $15.7 million (22% of revenue), while net income came in at $8.8 million. The company closed the year with $82.2 million in cash, up approximately $8.4 million from the prior quarter. Management projects 35% or more year-over-year growth for 2026, indicating continued momentum in the business. CEO Jack Abuhoff emphasized the company's positioning in AI and data science: We are well-positioned due to our 2025 innovations, which act as a flywheel for growth. The organization maintains a conservative forecasting approach while targeting increased customer diversification and hybrid human-technological solutions to drive recurring revenue and margin improvement.
